short_summary: AI curbs and Iran deal linger
rationale: Anthropic AI suspension for foreign nationals continues as active federal policy; Iran deal uncertainty persists with Lebanon strikes; US airstrike killing Tren de Aragua leader is a new domestic-relevant security action.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools for foreign nationals under US government order
top_events.summary: Federal security policy restricting AI access for non-US users continues, signaling ongoing government intervention in AI sector with potential regulatory and market implications for US residents.

top_events.title: US kills Tren de Aragua gang leader in airstrike, Trump announces
top_events.summary: Trump administration conducts airstrike targeting Venezuelan gang leader, a direct US military action with domestic political and security policy implications for Americans.

top_events.title: Iran claims US deal near; Israel strikes Lebanon despite deal inclusion
top_events.summary: US-Iran deal remains unresolved with Lebanon strikes complicating progress. If concluded, could reduce Middle East military engagement and oil market pressure for US consumers.
